projectName: Migrate Radix UI to Base UI
description: Replace all @radix-ui/* primitives with @base-ui/react equivalents. Radix is unmaintained; Base UI is actively developed by the MUI team. shadcn supports both since Jan 2026.

userStories.title: Install @base-ui/react dependency
userStories.description: As a developer, I need @base-ui/react installed so components can import Base UI primitives

userStories.title: Rewrite button.tsx from Radix Slot to Base UI render prop
userStories.description: As a developer, I want Button to use Base UI's render prop pattern instead of Radix Slot/asChild so it no longer depends on @radix-ui/react-slot
acceptanceCriteria: Button accepts render prop instead of asChild
Button renders as <button> by default when no render prop provided
Button renders as custom element when render prop is provided
userStories.notes: File: src/renderer/src/components/ui/button.tsx. Remove Slot import from @radix-ui/react-slot. Replace asChild prop with render prop. Use useRender from @base-ui/react or implement render prop pattern manually. No consumers currently use asChild on Button directly.

userStories.title: Rewrite collapsible.tsx and update Sidebar consumer
userStories.description: As a user, I want the sidebar database collapsibles to work using Base UI Collapsible primitives
acceptanceCriteria: Exports Collapsible, CollapsibleTrigger, CollapsibleContent (CollapsibleContent wraps Collapsible.Panel)
Sidebar.tsx uses render prop instead of asChild on CollapsibleTrigger
Database list in sidebar still expands/collapses on click
userStories.notes: Files: src/renderer/src/components/ui/collapsible.tsx, src/renderer/src/components/Sidebar.tsx:72. Base UI uses Collapsible.Panel instead of CollapsibleContent. Keep export name as CollapsibleContent for API compatibility. Change <CollapsibleTrigger asChild><Button> to <CollapsibleTrigger render={<Button>}>.

userStories.title: Rewrite dialog.tsx with Base UI Dialog primitives
userStories.description: As a user, I want dialogs (connection, document editor) to work using Base UI Dialog primitives
acceptanceCriteria: All existing exports preserved: Dialog, DialogPortal, DialogOverlay, DialogClose, DialogTrigger, DialogContent, DialogHeader, DialogFooter, DialogTitle, DialogDescription
hideClose prop on DialogContent still works
Animation data attributes updated: data-[state=open] → data-[open], data-[state=closed] → data-[closed]
Close button X still renders and works
userStories.notes: File: src/renderer/src/components/ui/dialog.tsx. Base UI Dialog uses Dialog.Root, Dialog.Trigger, Dialog.Portal, Dialog.Backdrop (replaces Overlay), Dialog.Popup (replaces Content), Dialog.Title, Dialog.Description, Dialog.Close. Update Tailwind animation classes from data-[state=open] to data-[open] and data-[state=closed] to data-[closed].

userStories.title: Rewrite popover.tsx and update DocumentTable consumer
userStories.description: As a user, I want the document table expand popover to work using Base UI Popover primitives
acceptanceCriteria: All existing exports preserved: Popover, PopoverTrigger, PopoverContent, PopoverAnchor
PopoverContent uses Positioner wrapper for positioning
Animation data attributes updated: data-[state=open] → data-[open], data-[state=closed] → data-[closed], data-[side=*] → data-[side=*]
DocumentTable.tsx uses render prop instead of asChild on PopoverTrigger
userStories.notes: Files: src/renderer/src/components/ui/popover.tsx, src/renderer/src/components/DocumentTable.tsx:188. Base UI Popover requires Positioner wrapper between Portal and Popup. Change <PopoverTrigger asChild><button> to <PopoverTrigger render={<button>}>.

userStories.title: Rewrite scroll-area.tsx with Base UI ScrollArea primitives
userStories.description: As a user, I want the sidebar scroll area to work using Base UI ScrollArea primitives
acceptanceCriteria: Scrollbar styling preserved for vertical and horizontal orientations
userStories.notes: File: src/renderer/src/components/ui/scroll-area.tsx. Base UI ScrollArea has very similar API: ScrollArea.Root, ScrollArea.Viewport, ScrollArea.Scrollbar, ScrollArea.Thumb, ScrollArea.Corner.

userStories.title: Remove all @radix-ui packages and verify build
userStories.description: As a developer, I want all @radix-ui dependencies removed now that everything uses @base-ui/react
